paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs
summary: The conjecture that a toroidal graph is 5-choosable if and only if it is 5-colorable remains open as of May 2026. The source paper (arXiv:2407.18800) provides partial computational evidence by enumerating minimal obstructions under a cyclic-triangle-system condition and finding no new obstructions beyond previously known ones. A wide web search found no follow-up paper resolving the full conjecture.
search_queries: arXiv 2407.18800 toroidal graph list coloring choosability
notes: No follow-up paper resolving the conjecture was found. The conjecture is closely related to Thomassen's characterization of 5-colorability on the torus and is stated in the source paper as equivalent to Conjecture 2. The paper arXiv:2502.17133 (Toroidal graphs without K5- and 6-cycles, 2025) addresses 4-choosability for a restricted subclass and is not directly related.
